title: Delving Mastery
summary: Delving branches between underground extraction and underwater discovery. Both branches reward going where most players won't — and finding what's there.

thresholds.title: First Descent
thresholds.description: Choose whether your mastery favors the cave or the sea.

thresholds.title: Steady Excavation
thresholds.description: Your chosen route changes the pace and safety of a run.

thresholds.title: Ore Sense
thresholds.description: A committed specialist now feels distinct in the deep.

thresholds.title: Deep Delver
thresholds.description: Late mastery turns your branch into a full Delving identity.

nodes.title: Clean Cuts
nodes.description: The underground route tears through stone and deepslate with ruthless efficiency.

nodes.title: Prospector's Eye
nodes.description: The prospecting route closes faster on ore veins and favors targeted extraction.

nodes.title: Vein Following
nodes.description: Each ore pocket feeds a burst of speed, letting you chain deposits together.

nodes.title: Deep Scan
nodes.description: A deep delver learns to see in poor light and read the dark more confidently.

nodes.title: Quarry Discipline
nodes.description: Stone breaks feed your tempo, turning tunnel work into an uninterrupted rush.

nodes.title: Voidward Prospecting
nodes.description: The deepest runs become survivable — letting a specialist stay in hostile ground longer.
